CREATE TABLE Demo.demo.Orders (OrderID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, CustomerID INTEGER, OrderDate DATE);
CREATE TABLE DB.DBA.SYS_REPL_ACCOUNTS (AccountID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, AccountName VARCHAR(255));
GRANT INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE ON Demo.demo.Orders TO demo;
SELECT __any_grants('Demo.demo.Orders');
SELECT __any_grants('DB.DBA.SYS_REPL_ACCOUNTS');
CREATE TABLE Demo.demo.Customers (CustomerID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, CustomerName VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Customers (CustomerID, CustomerName) VALUES (1, 'John Doe');
GRANT SELECT ON Demo.demo.Customers TO demo;
SELECT __any_grants('Demo.demo.Customers');
SET @table_name = 'Demo.demo.Orders'; SELECT __any_grants(@table_name);
SELECT __any_grants(CONCAT('Demo.demo.', 'Orders'));
SELECT __any_grants('Demo.demo.Orders') AS OrderGrants, __any_grants('Demo.demo.Customers') AS CustomerGrants;
CREATE VIEW Demo.demo.CustomerOrders AS SELECT c.CustomerID, o.OrderID FROM Demo.demo.Customers c JOIN Demo.demo.Orders o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID;
GRANT SELECT ON Demo.demo.CustomerOrders TO demo;
SELECT __any_grants('Demo.demo.CustomerOrders');
SELECT __any_grants('Demo.demo.Orders') OR __any_grants('Demo.demo.Customers') AS CombinedGrants;
SELECT __any_grants('Demo.demo.Orders') AND __any_grants('DB.DBA.SYS_REPL_ACCOUNTS') AS PermissionsCheck;
CREATE TABLE Demo.demo.Products (ProductID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ProductName VARCHAR(255));
GRANT INSERT ON Demo.demo.Products TO demo;
SELECT __any_grants('Demo.demo.Products') GROUP BY ProductID HAVING COUNT(ProductID) > 0;
